verses.1: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good,
verses.2: Let the redeemed by the LORD say so,
verses.3: and gathered out of the lands,
verses.4: They wandered in the wilderness in a desert way.
verses.6: Then they cried to the LORD in their trouble,
verses.7: He led them also by a straight way,
verses.8: Let them praise the LORD for his loving kindness,
verses.9: For he satisfies the longing soul.
verses.10: Some sat in darkness and in the shadow of death,
verses.11: because they rebelled against the words of God,
verses.12: Therefore he brought down their heart with labor.
verses.13: Then they cried to the LORD in their trouble,
verses.14: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death,
verses.15: Let them praise the LORD for his loving kindness,
verses.16: For he has broken the gates of bronze,
verses.17: Fools are afflicted because of their disobedience,
verses.18: Their soul abhors all kinds of food.
verses.19: Then they cry to the LORD in their trouble,
verses.20: He sends his word, and heals them,
verses.21: Let them praise the LORD for his loving kindness,
verses.22: Let them offer the sacrifices of thanksgiving,
verses.23: Those who go down to the sea in ships,
verses.25: For he commands, and raises the stormy wind,
verses.26: They mount up to the sky; they go down again to the depths.
verses.27: They reel back and forth, and stagger like a drunken man,
verses.28: Then they cry to the LORD in their trouble,
verses.29: He makes the storm a calm,
verses.30: Then they are glad because it is calm,
verses.31: Let them praise the LORD for his loving kindness,
verses.32: Let them exalt him also in the assembly of the people,
verses.33: He turns rivers into a desert,
verses.34: and a fruitful land into a salt waste,
verses.35: He turns a desert into a pool of water,
verses.36: There he makes the hungry live,
verses.38: He blesses them also, so that they are multiplied greatly.
verses.39: Again, they are diminished and bowed down
verses.41: Yet he lifts the needy out of their affliction,
verses.42: The upright will see it, and be glad.
verses.43: Whoever is wise will pay attention to these things.
